prompt: Overlay this HUD onto the robot’s visor.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by seamlessly overlaying the blue Heads-Up Display (HUD) from image 2 onto the black visor of the Darth Vader helmet. The HUD should appear as a functional visual display, as if viewed from inside the helmet and filling the entire visor area.
objects: Blue Heads-Up Display (HUD) on the visor
